landing.description: The smart revision planner that adapts to your pace, analyzes your courses and optimizes your schedule automatically.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Tools designed specifically for students aiming for excellence without sacrificing their wellbeing.
landing.feature1Desc: Upload your courses, syllabi or notes. Revix instantly analyzes them to extract key concepts, workload and deadlines.
landing.feature2Desc: Your calendar adjusts in real time. Something unexpected? Revix recalculates your whole plan to make sure you cover everything before the day.
landing.feature3Desc: Miss a session without stress. Our algorithm identifies critical sessions and intelligently reschedules them over the next days.
landing.feature4Desc: No more hours spent making lists. Revix does the hard work for you so you can focus on what matters: learning.
landing.ctaTitle: Ready to transform how you revise?
landing.ctaDesc: Create your free account and generate your first personalized schedule in minutes.
landing.howSubtitle: Four simple steps to transform your revisions.
landing.step1Desc: Create your subjects, add your chapters and set your exam dates.
landing.step2Desc: Select your free days and how many hours you can dedicate each day.
landing.step3Desc: An optimized schedule is automatically created based on your priorities and deadlines.
landing.step4Desc: Interactive calendar, flashcards, quizzes and real-time progress dashboard.
landing.feature3Point3: No guilt if you fall behind

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to access your academic success space.
